use std::collections::HashMap;

/// Application state for the merge tool.
pub struct App {
    pub left_text: String,
    pub right_text: String,
    pub current_diff: i32,
    pub scroll_offset: usize,
    pub has_unsaved_changes: bool,
    undo_stack: Vec<String>,
    redo_stack: Vec<String>,
}

impl App {
    pub fn new() -> Self {
        Self {
            left_text: String::new(),
            right_text: String::new(),
            current_diff: -1,
            scroll_offset: 0,
            has_unsaved_changes: false,
            undo_stack: Vec::new(),
            redo_stack: Vec::new(),
        }
    }

    pub fn next_diff(&mut self) {
        let count = self.diff_count();
        if count > 0 && self.current_diff < count as i32 - 1 {
            self.current_diff += 1;
        }
    }

    pub fn prev_diff(&mut self) {
        if self.current_diff > 0 {
            self.current_diff -= 1;
        }
    }

    fn diff_count(&self) -> u32 {
        0 // placeholder
    }

    pub fn scroll_down(&mut self, amount: usize) {
        self.scroll_offset += amount;
    }

    pub fn scroll_up(&mut self, amount: usize) {
        self.scroll_offset = self.scroll_offset.saturating_sub(amount);
    }

    pub fn undo(&mut self) {
        if let Some(snapshot) = self.undo_stack.pop() {
            self.redo_stack.push(self.left_text.clone());
            self.left_text = snapshot;
        }
    }

    pub fn redo(&mut self) {
        if let Some(snapshot) = self.redo_stack.pop() {
            self.undo_stack.push(self.left_text.clone());
            self.left_text = snapshot;
        }
    }
}

#[cfg(test)]
mod tests {
    use super::*;

    #[test]
    fn test_new_app() {
        let app = App::new();
        assert_eq!(app.current_diff, -1);
        assert!(!app.has_unsaved_changes);
    }
}
